rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the two trivial .mp/.mpr corollaries (lines 125-134) as bloat violating minimal API surface; only Review 1's other finding (missing @[simp] on the normal-form fiberHomeomorph_one, which has no other simp pathway) is a grounded, material api-design improvement that maintainers would insist on. Review 2's inverse lemma is non-essential (the file intentionally stays at MonoidHom and the monoid properties are already derivable) and would enlarge the surface, so acting on it yields a strictly inferior PR.
